The **iPhone** is a smartphone developed and marketed by Apple as the first device in the iPhone lineup of smartphones. After years of rumors and speculation, it was officially announced on January 9, 2007, and was released in the United States on June 29, 2007.

content: # Every iPhone release date in chronological order: 2007–2026. ### Whatever iPhone you use, the right apps make it work better for you.
